Z	e	
e"j#

e$j(Z

e	j*
e	j,e	j-f
n>e	d
r$e	j*
e	j,e	j-f

d d!d
d#d#d
)$Nz'A tool to manage dirty bitmap in image.)
descriptionF)
add_help
vmnamez,Name of vm whose images will be operated on.)
type
help
bitmapz
Name of bitmapz
--file-list
appendz
specifies a list of images to be operated on, if not presented, all images of vm will be operated on. User can specifies more that one images by adding multiple -f options)
action
defaultr
subcommands
commandz6Try '%s subcommand -h' to see the subcommand help info)
title
destr
addz
Add bitmap to imagez%Add a bitmap to images managed by vm.)
parentsr
removez
Remove bitmap from imagez
Remove one or more bitmaps from images managed by vm. When option --enable-regex is presented, the bitmap name is treated as a regular expression, all bitmaps in image whose name is matching this regex will be removed.z
--enable-regex
store_truezTindicates that the value of option 'bitmap' will be treated as a regular expression.)
checkz%Check the validity of bitmap in imagez#Check validity of a bitmap in image
listz
List all dirty bitmaps in disk)
